author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Added NaN to the bit-identical f64 roundtrip test in polars_conv.rs, matching the Arrow test. Polars turns out to preserve the exact NaN bit pattern on roundtrip, so the assert_eq!(a.to_bits(), b.to_bits()) check passes. Also added a second test (nan_f64_roundtrip_preserves_nan_ness) that asserts only is_nan() — the looser invariant — to guard against future Polars versions that might canonicalize the payload.
